flat_dim_bootstrap.note: flat dims bootstrapped by agent-instruction, not label-nudge (cold-start fix)
flat_dim_bootstrap.agent1_rule: >=1 of 3 atoms MUST be from a non-ML domain (biology/physics/economics/linguistics) -> forces cross_domain_reach > 0
flat_dim_bootstrap.agent3_rule: >=2 of 5 reformulations per candidate MUST use prior-art-probing phrasing ('has X been applied to Y','prior work combining X and Y') -> forces collision_avoidance > 0
